title: helichrysum buhseanum
intro: Helichrysum buhseanum, also known as the silver paper helichrysum, is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and white or yellow flowers. Traditionally, Helichrysum buhseanum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Helichrysum buhseanum can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or essential oils, often used in aromatherapy or topical applications for its therapeutic benefits.
